rationale_per_step.research-orchestrator-mock-eval: Testing/Observability: add a hermetic scenario-level eval exercising more of the research agent loop (executeAgentLoop / orchestrator) using mocked LLM and no E2B/DB/keys. Current research-smoke only covers registry/rubric. Directly supports reliable deep research and measurable research quality per vision.
rationale_per_step.extend-ci-eval-coverage: Testing/Observability + DX: wire the remaining smoke evals (parse, merged, semantic-search-scenario, and composite) into the CI verify job so all quality invariants run on every PR/merge. Addresses partial CI state after incremental eval additions.
rationale_per_step.add-tier-legend-to-search-ui: Feature improvement on UI/UX + discovery: add a compact tier/score legend or explanation affordance in search results. Builds on surfaced scores and centralized tier meta so users understand and trust vector search rankings with minimal noise. Advances 'powerful, intuitive discovery' and 'UI/UX' facets.
